done_summary: Triage complete. Processed 30 tickets, identified 3 duplicate clusters (007/011, 014/023/030), and produced structured JSON output at `/workspace/triage_results.json` with 12 categories and urgency levels. Key findings: 5 urgent items (security incident, active incidents, GDPR request), 6 spam/noise items, and 2 external-business items. README.md and decision logs in `/workspace/decisions/` explain rationale for ambiguous calls.
